case_title: BRUNA THALYTA DE LIMA SOARES VS. SABRINA CARMONA BARRIONUEVO

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: SUB-SERVED AFTER THE THIRD ATTEMPT TO JIM TARR THE HUSBAND. SERVED APR-08-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARMONA BARRIONUEVO, SABRINA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2021 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-24-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. CONTINUANCE NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. REQUESTED APPEARANCE BY COURT CERTIFIED PORTUGUESE INTERPRETER ROBERT DE LIMA BY PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT. COMM. PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,645.00 FILED BY DE LIMA SOARES, BRUNA THALYTA AS TO DEFENDANT CARMONA BARRIONUEVO, SABRINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-15-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BRUNA THALYTA DE LIMA SOARES IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS PABLO MICHAEL SOARES GOMEZ, HUSBAND. PLAINTIFF ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED PORTUGUESE INTERPRETER ROBERTO DE LIMA. DEFENDANT SABRINA CARMONA BARRIONUEVO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED PORTUGUESE INTERPRETER LUISA MCEWEN. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $747.50 TO BE PAID IN FOUR (4) PAYMENTS TO THE PLAINTIFF BY ZELLE. PAYMENTS ARE DUE ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH STARTING ON JUL-15-2021. THE FIRST 3 PAYMENTS SHALL BE $186; THE LAST PAYMENT ON OCT-15TH SHALL BE FOR 189.50. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NOV-15-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
